creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
On Sun, Sep 19, 2010 at 07:00:17PM +0000, Aldis Berjoza wrote:
>  Any news?
>  Did I miss something?

I gave it a try on our new (alternate) package build machine, but there
are still bugs being reported that don't have anything to do with
freeglut.

Unfortunately I won't have time to look at it again until after EuroBSDCon.
Sorry.

mcl
